title: Elden Ring
fun_fact: George R.R. Martin (Game of Thrones author) wrote the game's background mythology.

title: Dark Souls III
description: The final chapter of the Dark Souls trilogy.
fun_fact: Director Hidetaka Miyazaki originally envisioned the series as a dungeon crawler.

title: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
fun_fact: The game won Game of the Year 2019 - FromSoftware's first GOTY win!

title: Bloodborne
description: Hunt beasts in a Victorian nightmare.
fun_fact: The game shifts from gothic horror to cosmic horror midway through.

title: Demon's Souls Remake
description: The game that started it all, remade.
fun_fact: The original PS3 game pioneered the souls-like genre.

title: Armored Core VI
fun_fact: FromSoftware hadn't made an Armored Core game in 10 years before this entry!

title: DOOM Eternal
fun_fact: The Doom Slayer's rage is literally too angry for Hell to contain!

title: DOOM (2016)
fun_fact: The Glory Kill system was designed to keep players constantly aggressive.

title: ULTRAKILL
description: Blood is fuel. Kill is style.
fun_fact: The game is inspired by 90s shooters like Quake and Devil May Cry combat!

title: DUSK
fun_fact: A love letter to classic shooters like Quake and Blood.

title: Turbo Overkill
fun_fact: Your leg is a chainsaw. That's the whole pitch.

title: Prodeus
description: Modern retro FPS with a level editor.
fun_fact: Features a level editor with thousands of community maps.

title: Amid Evil
fun_fact: Made by the New Blood Interactive team behind DUSK.

title: Devil May Cry 5
fun_fact: The style ranking system encourages creative combat combos.

title: Bayonetta 3
fun_fact: Features kaiju-scale demon summons.

title: Hi-Fi Rush
fun_fact: The entire game syncs to the beat of the music - even enemy attacks!

title: Metal Gear Rising: Revengeance
fun_fact: The blade mode lets you cut anything into hundreds of pieces.

title: God of War Ragnarök
fun_fact: The game features over 70 unique boss encounters!

title: God of War (2018)
fun_fact: The entire game appears as one continuous camera shot.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man 2
fun_fact: The game's New York City is twice the size of the first game's map!

title: Marvel's Spider-Man Remastered
fun_fact: Web-swinging physics took years to perfect.

title: Spider-Man: Miles Morales
fun_fact: Features unique Venom powers not available to Peter.

title: Hogwarts Legacy
fun_fact: The game is set 100 years before Harry Potter was born.

title: Star Wars Jedi: Survivor
fun_fact: Cal Kestis is voiced by Cameron Monaghan, who also does motion capture.

title: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
fun_fact: Features exploration inspired by Metroid.

title: Helldivers 2
fun_fact: The game supports 'friendly fire' - your bullets really do hurt teammates!

title: Destiny 2
description: Sci-fi looter shooter with MMO elements.
fun_fact: Bungie previously created the Halo franchise before creating Destiny.

title: Warframe
fun_fact: Has been constantly updated for over 10 years with massive expansions.

title: The Division 2
fun_fact: Washington DC was recreated at 1:1 scale.

title: Outriders
fun_fact: Aggressive gameplay is encouraged - standing still gets you killed.

title: Borderlands 3
fun_fact: Features over 1 billion procedurally generated guns.

title: Tiny Tina's Wonderlands
fun_fact: Spin-off based on a beloved Borderlands 2 DLC.

title: Diablo IV
fun_fact: The game world is the largest in Diablo history, taking hours to cross on foot.

title: Path of Exile 2
fun_fact: The skill gem system allows for millions of possible build combinations!

title: Path of Exile
fun_fact: The passive skill tree has over 1,300 nodes.

title: Last Epoch
fun_fact: Features time travel as a core gameplay mechanic.

title: Torchlight III
fun_fact: Made by some of the original Diablo developers.

title: Grim Dawn
description: Dark ARPG in a dying world.
fun_fact: Made by former Titan Quest developers.

title: Valorant
fun_fact: Riot Games spent 6 years developing the game in secret before announcing it.

title: Counter-Strike 2
fun_fact: The original Counter-Strike started as a mod for Half-Life in 1999!

title: Apex Legends
fun_fact: The game launched with no marketing and gained 25 million players in its first week!

title: Call of Duty: Warzone
description: Massive Call of Duty battle royale.
fun_fact: Warzone uses the same engine that powered Modern Warfare 2019.

title: PUBG: Battlegrounds
description: The game that popularized battle royale.
fun_fact: Started as an ARMA mod and defined the battle royale genre.

title: Hunt: Showdown
description: Bounty hunting in a monster-filled swamp.
fun_fact: Features permadeath for hunters you lose.

title: Escape from Tarkov
fun_fact: Losing in a raid means losing all your gear permanently.

title: THE FINALS
fun_fact: Buildings can be completely destroyed during matches.

title: XDefiant
fun_fact: Features factions from various Ubisoft games.

title: Rainbow Six Siege
fun_fact: Every wall and surface can potentially be destroyed.

title: Overwatch 2
fun_fact: The original Overwatch took inspiration from the canceled Blizzard project 'Titan'.

title: Team Fortress 2
fun_fact: Still actively played after 17+ years.

title: Paladins
fun_fact: Features a card-based loadout system for customization.

title: Street Fighter 6
description: The next generation of Street Fighter.
fun_fact: The game's art director studied real martial arts for years to make animations authentic.

title: Tekken 8
description: The King of Iron Fist returns.
fun_fact: Each character has over 100 unique moves, making it one of the deepest fighting games ever.

title: Mortal Kombat 1
description: A new era for Mortal Kombat.
fun_fact: The MK franchise has been restarted 3 times now with different timelines!

title: Guilty Gear Strive
fun_fact: Features a hard rock/metal soundtrack that plays during fights.

title: Dragon Ball FighterZ
fun_fact: Considered the best Dragon Ball game ever made.

title: Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising
fun_fact: Based on one of Japan's most popular mobile games.

title: Under Night In-Birth II
fun_fact: Known for its deep and rewarding combat system.

title: Brawlhalla
fun_fact: Features crossovers from many franchises including WWE and TMNT.

title: MultiVersus
fun_fact: Features Batman, Shaggy, Bugs Bunny, and more in one game.

title: Rivals of Aether II
fun_fact: Features a workshop for community-made characters.

title: Dead by Daylight
fun_fact: The game has featured licensed killers from over 20 horror franchises!

title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
fun_fact: Licensed from the classic 1974 horror film.

title: Propnight
fun_fact: Combines prop hunt gameplay with horror chase mechanics.

title: World War Z: Aftermath
fun_fact: Features swarms of 500+ zombies on screen.

title: Back 4 Blood
fun_fact: Made by the original Left 4 Dead developers.

title: Left 4 Dead 2
fun_fact: Still has an active modding community 15+ years later.

title: Killing Floor 2
fun_fact: Features a slow-motion system called Zed Time.

title: PAYDAY 3
fun_fact: Heists can be completed stealthily or guns blazing.

title: GTFO
fun_fact: Requires extreme coordination and communication to survive.

title: Ready or Not
fun_fact: Non-lethal options are often the best approach.

title: Zero Hour
fun_fact: Features a planning phase before each mission.

title: Ground Branch
fun_fact: Made by former Red Storm developers (Ghost Recon, Rainbow Six).

title: Squad
fun_fact: Matches can last hours with 50v50 battles.

title: Hell Let Loose
fun_fact: Maps are based on real WW2 battlefields.

title: Insurgency: Sandstorm
fun_fact: One bullet can kill - no health bars or hit markers.

title: Arma 3
fun_fact: The modding community has created everything from zombie survival to life simulation.

title: Arma Reforger
fun_fact: Built on Bohemia's new Enfusion engine.

title: War Thunder
fun_fact: Players have leaked classified military documents to win arguments about accuracy.

title: World of Tanks
fun_fact: Features historically accurate tank models.

title: World of Warships
fun_fact: Features legendary warships from WWI and WWII.

title: MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries
fun_fact: Based on the tabletop BattleTech universe.

title: Titanfall 2
fun_fact: The campaign is considered one of the best FPS campaigns ever made.

title: Hawken Reborn
fun_fact: Revived as an extraction shooter with PvPvE.

title: Gundam Evolution
fun_fact: Features iconic Mobile Suits from across the Gundam franchise.

title: Ace Combat 7
fun_fact: Features an original story with memorable characters.

title: Project Wingman
fun_fact: Made by a small indie team inspired by Ace Combat.

title: DCS World
fun_fact: Professional pilots use DCS for training.

title: Star Wars: Squadrons
fun_fact: Designed primarily for VR play.

title: Everspace 2
fun_fact: Shifted from roguelike to open-world based on community feedback.

title: Chorus
fun_fact: Features a sentient starship with its own personality.

title: Sifu
description: Kung fu revenge with aging mechanic.
fun_fact: Martial arts experts consulted on every punch and kick animation.

title: Absolver
fun_fact: Create your own fighting style from learned moves.

title: Sleeping Dogs
fun_fact: Features authentic Hong Kong locations and culture.

title: Yakuza 0
description: Origin story of Kiryu and Majima.
fun_fact: Considered the best entry point to the Yakuza series.

title: Judgment
fun_fact: Features a detective as protagonist instead of a yakuza.

title: Lost Judgment
description: Investigate a murder at a high school.
fun_fact: Features undercover investigation at a school.

title: Shadow Warrior 3
fun_fact: Features over-the-top finishing moves.

title: Ghostrunner 2
fun_fact: You die in one hit but so do enemies.

title: Ghostrunner
fun_fact: Inspired by Hotline Miami's one-hit-kill philosophy.

title: Hotline Miami 2
fun_fact: Features a non-linear story across multiple timelines.

title: Neon White
fun_fact: The speedrunning community helped design levels during development!

title: Katana Zero
fun_fact: The game's narrative changes based on your actions and dialogue choices.

title: Pizza Tower
fun_fact: The game's physics were inspired by Wario Land games from the 90s.

title: Death's Door
fun_fact: The game was made by just 2 people in under 2 years!

title: Hyper Light Drifter
fun_fact: The developer has a heart condition that inspired the game's themes.

title: Hyper Light Breaker
fun_fact: Brings the Hyper Light world into 3D for the first time.

title: Moonlighter
description: Dungeon dive and run a shop.
fun_fact: Balance dungeon crawling at night with shopkeeping by day.

title: Rogue Legacy 2
fun_fact: Each heir has unique traits like colorblindness or gigantism.

title: Curse of the Dead Gods
fun_fact: Curses can be both helpful and harmful.

title: Wizard of Legend
fun_fact: Over 100 spells to combine and master.

title: Skul: The Hero Slayer
fun_fact: Each skull completely changes your playstyle.

title: Children of Morta
fun_fact: Features a touching family narrative between runs.

title: Anger Foot
description: Kick doors, kick enemies, kick everything.
fun_fact: Kicking is the primary combat mechanic.

title: Palworld
fun_fact: The game sold 25 million copies in its first month of Early Access!

title: The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom
fun_fact: The physics engine allows for creations so complex that players have built working computers in-game!

title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
fun_fact: Development took over 4 years and inspired an entirely new type of open world.

title: Link's Awakening
fun_fact: The entire island exists only in the Wind Fish's dream.

title: Horizon Forbidden West
fun_fact: The robotic creatures are inspired by real animal behaviors and movement.

title: Horizon Zero Dawn
fun_fact: The world was created without referencing other open-world games.

title: Cyberpunk 2077
fun_fact: The game's Night City was modeled after real architectural principles.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: The twilight of the Old West.
fun_fact: The game has over 500,000 lines of dialogue - more than most film franchises!

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: Hunt monsters as Geralt of Rivia.
fun_fact: The game has 16 different endings based on your choices throughout!

title: Assassin's Creed Mirage
fun_fact: Designed as a return to the series' stealth roots.

title: Assassin's Creed Valhalla
description: Lead a Viking clan in England.
fun_fact: Features historically accurate Viking settlements and culture.

title: Ghost of Tsushima
description: Become a legend on Tsushima Island.
fun_fact: Features a 'Kurosawa Mode' that adds black-and-white film grain.

title: Black Myth: Wukong
description: Journey to the West as the Monkey King.
fun_fact: Based on the classic Chinese novel Journey to the West.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2
fun_fact: Your AI companions can be shared online with other players.
